title: Sell automotive products and services
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Sell automotive products and services demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Engage customer and identify potential sale

pcs.text: Maintain welcoming customer environment and approach customer in a timely and professional manner according to workplace procedures1.2 Use interpersonal skills to engage the customer according to workplace procedures1.3 Identify customer needs and expectations for specific products and services through questioning and active listening
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain welcoming customer environment and approach customer in a timely and professional manner according to workplace procedures1.2 Use interpersonal skills to engage the customer according to workplace procedures1.3 Identify customer needs and expectations for specific products and services through questioning and active listening?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain welcoming customer environment and approach customer in a timely and professional manner according to workplace procedures1.2 Use interpersonal skills to engage the customer according to workplace procedures1.3 Identify customer needs and expectations for specific products and services through questioning and active listening.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Engage customer and identify potential sale

elements.title: Present and demonstrate product or service to customer

pcs.text: Select product or service options that best meet customer needs 2.2 Explain and demonstrate product or service features, functions and accessories, eliciting customer interaction2.3 Give customers the opportunity to test or trial the product or service in line with workplace procedures2.4 Assist customers to identify their preferred option
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select product or service options that best meet customer needs 2.2 Explain and demonstrate product or service features, functions and accessories, eliciting customer interaction2.3 Give customers the opportunity to test or trial the product or service in line with workplace procedures2.4 Assist customers to identify their preferred option?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select product or service options that best meet customer needs 2.2 Explain and demonstrate product or service features, functions and accessories, eliciting customer interaction2.3 Give customers the opportunity to test or trial the product or service in line with workplace procedures2.4 Assist customers to identify their preferred option.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Present and demonstrate product or service to customer

elements.title: Obtain customer agreement to purchase product or service

pcs.text: Discuss or negotiate price for product or service and agree with customer3.2 Make sale using closing technique according to workplace procedures3.3 Process and document sale according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss or negotiate price for product or service and agree with customer3.2 Make sale using closing technique according to workplace procedures3.3 Process and document sale according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss or negotiate price for product or service and agree with customer3.2 Make sale using closing technique according to workplace procedures3.3 Process and document sale according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Obtain customer agreement to purchase product or service

elements.title: Complete transaction and customer follow-up procedures

pcs.text: Supply or deliver product or service transaction to customer according to supplier specifications and workplace delivery procedures4.2 Determine customer satisfaction and take remedial action as required to maximise repeat business or referral opportunities4.3 Identify opportunities for value adding or repeat sales and take follow-up action in line with workplace procedures4.4 Complete customer records and develop plans for follow-up of potential new sales of products and services
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Supply or deliver product or service transaction to customer according to supplier specifications and workplace delivery procedures4.2 Determine customer satisfaction and take remedial action as required to maximise repeat business or referral opportunities4.3 Identify opportunities for value adding or repeat sales and take follow-up action in line with workplace procedures4.4 Complete customer records and develop plans for follow-up of potential new sales of products and services?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Supply or deliver product or service transaction to customer according to supplier specifications and workplace delivery procedures4.2 Determine customer satisfaction and take remedial action as required to maximise repeat business or referral opportunities4.3 Identify opportunities for value adding or repeat sales and take follow-up action in line with workplace procedures4.4 Complete customer records and develop plans for follow-up of potential new sales of products and services.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete transaction and customer follow-up procedures

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.
